name: io.github.pepitahq/mcp
title: pepita
description: Read, edit, publish, and preview your pepita websites from Claude.

environmentVariables.name: PEPITA_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: pepita bearer token; overrides the token written to ~/.pepita/config.json by `pepita login`.

environmentVariables.name: PEPITA_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: pepita API host. Defaults to https://app.pepita.dev.
